interaction_phrase: Head of Quantum Control at Diraq
occurrence_sentence: Dr. Henry Yang, Head of Quantum Control at Diraq, was lead author of the team's [previous paper](https://rdcu.be/dwh7N), published in _Nature_ in 2020 that created awareness of the challenges and opportunities of operating 'hot qubits.'
